creator: clint@clintarmstrong.net
text:
When trying to build multimedia/emby-server in poudriere the following error is logged.

=> Attempting to fetch https://codeload.github.com/MediaBrowser/MediaBrowser/tar.gz/3.0.5641.4?dummy=/MediaBrowser-MediaBrowser-3.0.5641.4_GH0.tar.gz
fetch: https://codeload.github.com/MediaBrowser/MediaBrowser/tar.gz/3.0.5641.4?dummy=/MediaBrowser-MediaBrowser-3.0.5641.4_GH0.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 54577043, actual 54582083

A makesum corrects the issue, updating the file size in distinfo to 54582083.
